scripts.setup: npm install && npm run setup:env && npm run setup:playwright
scripts.setup:playwright: npm exec -w apps/backend playwright install chromium
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/frontend && npm run build -w apps/backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/frontend && npm run lint -w apps/backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w apps/frontend && npm run test -w apps/backend
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
